features.featureTitle: Build a Trading Activity Feed page as the main view. Fetch trading events from the backend and display each as a card showing: social handle, wallet address (truncated), token symbol and name, BUY/SELL badge (color-coded green/red), amount, price in USD, network label ('Monad Testnet'), and relative timestamp. Each card must include an 'Add to Watchlist' button and a 'View on DEX' button (opens a placeholder external URL).

Build a Watchlist page accessible via a nav tab. Display all tokens saved to the watchlist fetched from the backend. Each watchlist entry shows token symbol, token name, and a 'Remove' button that calls the backend removeFromWatchlist function. Show an empty state message when the watchlist is empty.

Apply a degen-crypto visual theme throughout the app: near-black dark background, neon green and magenta/pink accent colors, monospace or bold sans-serif typography, glowing card borders, and a terminal-inspired grid layout. Include a top navigation bar with the app name 'Social Signals' and tabs for 'Feed' and 'Watchlist'. Render the generated logo asset (social-signals-logo.dim_256x256.png) from frontend/public/assets/generated in the nav bar.
